system.description: Make sure someone knows what’s uncool. Tell someone the worst part of a simple activity, hobby, specific course of action, or profession. Roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
they wouldn’t be
caught dead doing that thing. If it’s
their responsibility or job, they will do
everything they can to get out of, or
ignore, it. If they really have to do it,
they approach it with embarrassment,
shame, and/or frustration depending
on their disposition. This effect ends if
the target ever sees you embarrassed.
outcomes.eachplus3:
you can list other
uncool things the first thing “is just like.”
They’ll feel equally interested in avoiding
those behaviors or activities, too
outcomes.failure:
who cares what you think?
They love that thing now. In fact, they
want to do it even more. As much as
possible. To a dangerous degree.

improvement.question: When it's time to hang a painting...

answer1.text: I tap the wall to find a stud.

answer2.text: I hire a stud to tap the wall.
